DESCRIPTION This thin chain of silvery-gray metal holds a series of interlocking rings that slowly turn within themselves in an accurate replication of the celestial sphere. The amulet grants its wearer a +5 competence bonus on Spellcraft checks. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must have 5 ranks in the Spellcraft skill; Cost 1,250 gp.
